name: Vision HERO Gravito
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｖ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヴィジョンヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> グラビート
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 of your banished "HERO" monsters; add it to your hand. You can Tribute this card, then target 2 "Vision HERO" Monster Cards in your Spell & Trap Zone; Special Summon them. You can only use each effect of "Vision HERO Gravito" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 of your banished "HERO" monsters; add it to your hand. You can Tribute this card, then target 2 "Vision HERO" Monster Cards in your Spell & Trap Zone; Special Summon them. You can only use each effect of "Vision HERO Gravito" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 of your banished "HERO" monsters; add it to your hand. You can Tribute this card, then target 2 "Vision HERO" Monster Cards in your Spell & Trap Zone; Special Summon them. You can only use each effect of "Vision HERO Gravito" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
summoning: Special Summons from your Spell & Trap Zone
